narrative:
Liberty Township (precinct in Adams County) has 1,275 registered voters, with 49.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.0 percentage points.
